title: Deep Dark GUI
description: A GUI inspired by the Warden's colors.
body:
### Hello and welcome to this second GUI ResourcePack !

###  

It is Deep Dark themed and inspired by the colors of the Warden.

**Fabric and ModMenu are supported as well.**

Check the gallery to see how it looks in game !

If you have any feedback, you can join my discord server I created for my GUIs.

_Thank you, and have a nice day :)_
